description: MQTT 全链路（上传回传、事件解析、连接状态等；子场景一律用消息内 `scene:` 区分，例如 `trans_mqtt` / `summary_mqtt` / `event`）

success_signals.pattern: scene: trans_mqtt - Transcription successful, synchronized with the mini-program.  .*
scene: event - tags_mqtt - detailNeedComplete already set, skip. recordId: .*
scene: translate_mqtt - Translation successful, sync the mini program.  .*
scene: edit_transcription - Transcription data cleared successfully  .*
scene: edit_summary - Data summary cleanup successful  .*
scene: trans_mqtt - Transcription status ： .* recordId: .* Database synchronization succeeded
scene: summary_mqtt - Summarize status : .* recordId: .* Database synchronization succeeded
scene: translate_mqtt - Translation status : .* recordId: .* Database synchronization succeeded

failure_signals.pattern: scene: event - MQTT message format error, message.message is not a dictionary
scene: trans_mqtt - No corresponding file record found locally, recordId: .*
scene: trans_mqtt - Transcription failed. Synchronize with the mini-program.  .*
scene: summary_mqtt - No corresponding file record found locally, recordId: .*
scene: summary_mqtt - Sync Mini Program Failed  .*
scene: event - tags_mqtt - No corresponding file record found locally, recordId: .*
scene: event - tags_mqtt - Failed to persist detailNeedComplete, recordId: .*, error: .*
scene: event - tags_mqtt - fileWithRecordId failed, recordId: .*
scene: translate_mqtt - No corresponding file record found locally, recordId: .*
scene: translate_mqtt - Synchronization failed for the mini-program.  .*
scene: edit_transcription - No corresponding file record found locally, recordId: .*
scene: edit_summary - No corresponding file record found locally, recordId: .*
scene: trans_mqtt - Transcription status ： .* recordId: .* Database synchronization failed
scene: summary_mqtt - Summarize status ： .* recordId: .* Summarize database synchronization failure
scene: translate_mqtt - Translation status : .* recordId: .* Database synchronization failed

lifecycle_signals.pattern: scene: event - Remove listener; current number of listeners : .*

noise_patterns: scene: event - Add listener; current number of listeners :
scene: event - User login, add  MQTT Agent
scene: event - User logout and removal  MQTT Agent
scene: event - Audio received  MQTT Message : protocol=%ld,
scene: event - Parsed data : %@
scene: event - MQTT Connection Status Change From  %d -> %d
scene: event - Parse event : %@
scene: event - Distribute event to  %lu a listener : eventT
scene: connection - MQTT connection change triggers record
scene: trans_mqtt - type: %@ recordId: %@ status: %@ jsonSu
scene: trans_mqtt - The local file has been soft-deleted; s
scene: trans_mqtt - modifyTime (%lld) No later than local
scene: trans_mqtt - modifyTime (%lld) Later than local  upd
scene: trans_mqtt - Transcribing, synchronizing the mini-pr
scene: trans_mqtt -  not found file which recordId is %@
scene: summary_mqtt - type: %@ recordId: %@ status: %@ json
scene: summary_mqtt - The local file has been soft-deleted;
scene: summary_mqtt - modifyTime (%lld) No later than local
scene: summary_mqtt - modifyTime (%lld) Later than local  u
scene: summary_mqtt - Synchronize Mini Program in Summary
